display_text: Beastmaster Aghanim's Scepter: Drums of Slom — Counters sustained damage by providing AoE healing for Beastmaster and his units. Transforms Beastmaster into a sustain-focused teamfight presence, leveraging frequent attacks and Primal Roar to maximize healing output and damage in prolonged engagements.
search_text: Beastmaster Aghanim Scepter counter-sustain healing drums of slom teamfight role change

display_text: Beastmaster Aghanim's Shard: Enhances Call of the Wild Hawk — Counters vision denial by increasing Hawk duration and summoning an additional Hawk. Strengthens Beastmaster's scouting and map control capabilities, making him a superior information provider for team engagements and objective control.
search_text: Beastmaster Aghanim Shard counter-vision hawk scouting map control role change
